since_last: 62% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.86%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -0.68% · Gold +0.35% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 62% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.86%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.86%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CGNX is the standout at +5.95%
cards.body: Leaders: CGNX +5.95%, SKHY +5.54%, MU +4.27%, BABA +3.60%, BIDU +3.49%. Laggards: EQIX -3.97%, WDAY -2.18%, SAP -1.88%, NOW -1.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.76% at $126.17
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
